SourceText: ParentText is easiest to use when you receive content as videos, images and text. However, your data bundle and bandwidth may not support videos. To save on data, you can choose to receive the same content with a smaller audio file or as text. How would you like to receive ParentText?
text: I-ParentText kulula ukuyisebenzisa xa ufumana umxholo ngeevidiyo, imifanekiso kunye nemibhalo. Noxa kunjalo, idatha yakho kunye ne-bandwidth ayinakuzixhasa iividiyo. Ukugcina idatha, unokukhetha ukufumana umxholo ofanayo kunye nefayile yesandi encinci okanye njengombhalo. Ungathanda ukuyifumana njani i-ParentText?

SourceText: Sorry, I don't understand what you mean.
Welcome to ParentText! This chatbot has been designed with and for parents just like you. We hope you find it useful!
text: Wamkelekile kwi-ParentText! Eli qonga lokuncokola lenzelwe abazali abanje ngawe. Siyathemba uyakuyifumana iluncedo!

SourceText: Would you like to go back to the previous messages?
That's okay. Type {HELP} at any time if you would like the details of emergency services or other hotlines.
text: Kulungile. Cofa {HELP} nangeliphi na ixesha xa ufuna inkcukacha ngenkonzo zongxamiseko okanye umnxeba.

SourceText: Here are the contact details of your local emergency services:
text: Nazi iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zeenkonzo zakho zengxakeko zengingqi:

SourceText: Type {HELP} at any time if you would like the details of emergency services or other hotlines. Remember everything you say will be completely private!
text: Cofa {HELP} nangeliphi na ixesha ukuba ungathanda ukufumana iinkcukacha zenkonzo zongxamiseko okanye inombolo zomnxeba.Khumbula yonke into oyithethayo iyakuba bucala ngokupheleleyo!

SourceText: If you ever feel like talking privately to a trained professional, you can call:
text: Ukuba ngaba unemvakalelo yokuthetha bucala negcisa eliqeqeshiweyo, ungatsalela:

SourceText: Here are the contact details of your local medical services:
text: Nazi iinkcukacha zoqhagamshelwano zeenkonzo zakho zonyango zengingqi:

SourceText: Are you currently facing an emergency?
Do you need some support with an emotional issue?
text: Ingaba ufuna inkxaso ethile ngomba wasemoyeni?

SourceText: Are you currently experiencing a health issue?
Are you experiencing an unsafe situation?
Do you need some urgent help?
Please type {MENU} to access resources and review completed modules, {PLAY} to receive a playful activity you can complete with your child, or {HELP} to access local support resources for a crisis.
text: Ndicela ucofe {MENU} ukufumana izixhobo kwaye uphonononge iimodyuli ezigqityiweyo, {PLAY} ukufumana umsebenzi wokudlala onokuthi uwenze nomntwana wakho, okanye {HELP} ukufikelela kwizibonelelo zenkxaso zasekuhlaleni ngexesha likaxakeka.

SourceText: You have not given consent to participate in this programme. Would you like to participate?
text: Awuyinikanga imvume yokuthatha inxaxheba kule nkqubo. Ungathanda ukuthatha inxaxheba?

SourceText: If you ever decide to participate in the programme, type HELLO.
text: Ukuba uthatha isigqibo sokuthatha inxaxheba kwinkqubo, cofa MOLO.

SourceText: We hope to see you again soon, and we wish you a happy and peaceful day!
text: Sinethemba lokukubona kwakhona kungekudala, kwaye sikunqwenelela usuku olumnandi nolunoxolo!

SourceText: Parenting is hard. ParentText may help. Would you like to continue your progress?
text: Ubuzali bunzima. I-ParentText inganceda. Ungathanda ukuqhubekeka nenkqubela yakho?

SourceText: That's okay. If you ever decide to come back, type HELLO.
text: Kulungile. Ukuba uye wagqiba ukubuyela umva, cofa MOLO.

SourceText: You are already part of ParentText!
Staying in ParentText helps you and your child. Are you sure you want to exit the programme?
text: Ukuhlala kwi ParentText kunganceda wena kunye nomntwana wakho. Uqinisekile ukuba ufuna ukuphuma kule nkqubo?

SourceText: If you do not want to receive any more messages, please type "EXIT".
text: Ukuba awufuni ukufumana nayiphina na imiyalezo, Sicela ucofe "PHUMA".

SourceText: If you made a mistake, please type "BACK".
Thank you for participating. If you want to return to the programme, type HELLO.
text: Enkosi ngokuthatha inxaxheba. Ukuba ufuna ukubuyela kule nkqubo, cofa MOLO.

SourceText: We hope to see you again soon!
This feature will be available once you have completed registration. It won’t take long. Please continue your progress!
text: Eli nqaku liza kufumaneka xa sele ugqibile ukubhalisa. Ayizukuthatha ixesha elide. Nceda uqhubeke nenkqubela yakho!

SourceText: The menu will be available once you have completed registration. It won’t take long. Please continue your progress!
text: Olu luhlu luza kufumaneka kanye xa ugqibile ubhaliso. Ayizothatha xesha lide. Sicela uqhubeke nenkqubela phambili yakho yakho!

SourceText: In this course, you will complete @fields.c_n_mod lessons. You will receive a new lesson each day. Your first lesson is @results.name.
text: Kwesisifundo, uzakugqibezela @fields.c_n_mod yezifundo. Uzakufumana isifundo esitsha ngosuku ngaliye. Isifundo sakho sokuqala ku @results.name.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You have completed @fields.c_n_mod_compl out of @fields.c_n_mod lessons in this course. Today's lesson is @results.name.
text: Uye wagqiba i @fields.c_n_mod_compl ngaphandle kwe @fields.c_n_mod yesifundo kwesisifundo. Isifundo sakho sokuqala ku @results.name.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Let’s get started. Press NEXT to begin.
Well done. You're ready to start the programme.
You only have the following lesson to complete:

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Which lesson would you like to complete?

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You haven't started to work on a course yet.
You have only started the course
Would you like support on it?
That's okay. You can access more information at any time in the Main Menu. Just type {MENU}.
text: Kulungile. Ungazifumana iinkcukacha ezongezelelweyo nangeliphina ixesha kuluhlu olungaphambili. Cofa {MENU}.

SourceText: You haven't completed a lesson yet.
Which course do you want to review?

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated. @results.count is a number (counter for list)

SourceText: You haven't completed any of the lessons in this course.
You have only completed the following lesson:
Would you like to review it?
That's okay. You can come back here at any time to review it.
text: Kulungile. Ungabuyela kwakhona nangeliphina ixesha usiphonononge.

SourceText: You have completed @fields.n_s_modules_compl lessons within this course. Which lesson do you want to review?
text: Uye wagqiba @fields.n_s_modules_compl izifundo phakathi kwiesisifundo. Sesiphi isifundo ofuna ukusiphonononga?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.
Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated. @results.count is a number (counter for list)

SourceText: What would you like to do next?
What would you like to do?
What kind of activity do you want to try with your teen?
text: Ngowuphi umdlalo ofuna ukuwuzama kunye nomntwana wakho?

SourceText: What kind of activity do you want to try with your baby?
text: Ngowuphi umdlalo ofuna ukuwuzama nosana lwakho?

SourceText: What kind of activity do you want to try with your child?
text: Ngowuphi umdlalo ofuna ukuwuzama kunye nomntwana wakho?

SourceText: Do you want to begin now or tomorrow?
It takes only 5 days to complete this first course and earn your parenting certificate.
text: Ithatha nje kuphela iintsuku ezintlanu ukugqiba esisifundo sokuqala kwaye uzifumanele isatifikethi sakho sobuzali.

SourceText: We will let you know in a few months when the next module about keeping your child safe is ready.
text: Siza kukwazisa kwiinyanga ezimbalwa xa isele ilungile imodyuli elandelayo emalunga nokugcina umntwana wakho ekhuselekile.

SourceText: 🎉You did it!🎉 You have completed the course @results.name. Here's your course certificate. Congratulations!
text: 🎉Uyenzile!🎉 Usigqibile isifundo @results.name. Nasi isatifiketi sakho. Siyavuyisana nawe!
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Remember, you can always return to ParentText and get extra support or review this information. Just type {MENU}.
text: Khumbula, ungakwazi ukuphinda ubuyele kwi Parent Text kwaye ufumane inkxaso eyongezelelwe okanye ungasuke ucofe {MENU}.

SourceText: ParentText has begun. You are just 5 days away from earning your parenting certificate. Are you ready to complete your registration and get started?
text: I-ParentText seyiqalile. Unentsuku ezintlanu ukuyofika ekufumaneni isatifikethi sakho sobuzali. Ukulungele ukugqiba ubhaliso kwaye ube sewuqalisa?

SourceText: Press a number on your keypad:
You’re off track! Do you want to complete your previous unifinished lesson or start a new lesson?
text: Uphumile endleleni! Ingaba uyafuna ukugqibezela isifundo sakho sangaphambili esingagqitywanga okanye uqale isifundo esitsha?

SourceText: Do you want to catch up and proceed to the next lesson?
text: Ingaba uyafuna ukuqhubekeka okanye uqhubeke nesifundo esilandelayo?

SourceText: You're almost finished with this course! You only have 1 unfinished lesson. What would you like to do?
text: Sekukufutshane ugqibe ngesisifundo! Unesifundo esinye kuphela ongasigqibanga. Ungathanda ukwenza ntoni?

SourceText: 1. Finish this lesson and earn my course certificate
text: 1. Gqibezela esi sifundo kwaye ufumane isatifikethi sesifundo sam

SourceText: You're almost finished with this course! You have @fields.c_n_mod_started unfinished lessons. What would you like to do?
text: Sekukufuphi ugqibezele esi sifundo sakho! Une @fields.c_n_mod_started kwi zifundo ezingagqitywanga. Ungathanda ukwenza ntoni?
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 1. Complete unfinished lessons to earn my course certificate
text: 1. Gqibezela izifundo ezingagqitywanga ukufumana isatifikethi sam sesifundo

SourceText: It's time to get started on ParentText. Are you ready?
Press a number on your keypad:
I've got another lesson ready for you! Are you ready?
We hope this was helpful! You can access the Main Menu at any time by typing {MENU}.
text: Siyathemba ukuba lento ibeluncedo olukhulu! Ungayifumana kwi Menyu nangeliphina ixesha ngokucofa {MENU}.

SourceText: To invite someone to join, share this link!
text: Ukumema omnye umntu ajoyine, yabelana nge khonkco!

SourceText: You have reached the end of this lesson! 🎉
What do you want to do next?
text: Yintoni enye into ofuna ukuyenza elandelayo?

SourceText: That's okay. You can access more information at any time in the Main Menu.
text: Kulungile. Ungazifumana iinkcukacha ezongezelelweyo nangeliphina ixesha kuluhlu olungaphambili.

SourceText: 🎉You did it! Congratulations!🎉 You have completed all the available courses. Well done!
text: 🎉 Usebenzile! Sivuyisana nawe🎉 Uzigqibile zonke izifundo ezikhoyo. Wenze kakuhle!

SourceText: You have completed @fields.c_n_mod_compl out of @fields.c_n_mod lessons.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.
Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

text: Okwangoku useto lwemidiya yakho nguMbhalo, Imifanekiso, kunye nee Vidiyo.

text: Okwangoku useto lwemidiya yakho nguMbhalo, Imifanekiso, kunye nee Zandi.

SourceText: Your current media setting is Text and Images Only.
text: Okwangoku useto lwemidiya yakho nguMbhalo, Imifanekiso Kuphela.

You are currently receiving messages in English.
You are currently receiving messages in Afrikaans.
You are currently receiving messages in IsiXhosa.
You are currently receiving messages in
Would you like to change your language?
It looks like this is not a good time. Please type 1 if you'd like to continue.
text: Kubonakala ngathi ayiloxesha elilungileyo eli. Nceda ucofe u-1 ukuba ungathanda ukuqhubeka.

SourceText: You will continue with your progress tomorrow.
The transaction for sending your airtime of R @results.amount has failed.
text: Intengiselwano yokuthumela i-airtime yakho ye-R @results.amount ayiphumelelanga.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: If you have not received your airtime in 72 hours, please send a message to {WhatsApp SWIFT line support} with your transaction ID.
text: Ukuba awuyifumenanga i-airtime kwiiyure eziyi-72, nceda uthumele umyalezo ku-{WhatsApp SWIFT line support} kunye ne-ID yakho yentengiselwano.

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: Your airtime of R @results.amount will be sent to this WhatsApp number. Please allow up to 72 hours for the payment to process.
text: I-airtime yakho ye R @results.amount izakuthunyelwa kule nombolo yakho ka WhatsApp. Nceda uvumele ukuya kuthi ga kwiiyure ezingama-72 ukuze intlawulo iqhube.
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: 🥳 It's time for your 2nd survey. This survey contains about 25 questions. You will receive R50 airtime for participating. Are you ready to get started?
text: 🥳 Lixesha lesaveyi yakho yesibini. Olu phando lunemibuzo emalunga namashumi amabini anesihlanu. Uza kufumana i-airtime ye-R50 ngokuthatha inxaxheba. Ingaba ukulungele ukuqalisa?

SourceText: 🥳 It's time for your last survey.  If you complete the survey, you will receive R50 airtime. Are you ready to get started?
text: 🥳Lixesha lokuba wenze isaveyi yakho yokugqibela.  Ukuba uyalugqiba uphando, uza kufumana i-airtime ye-R50. Ingaba ukulungele ukuqalisa?

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You've already started improving your relationship with your child! Learn more with our easy 5-day course on child safety in ParentText. Just 10 minutes each day. Earn a certificate when you finish! Want to start?
text: Sele uqalile ukuphucula ubudlelwane bakho nomntwana wakho! Funda okungakumbi ngesifundo sethu seentsuku ezi-5 sokukhusela abantwana kwiParentText. Imizuzu nje ezi-10 ngo suku ngalunye. Fumana isatifiketi xa ugqibile! Ngaba ufuna ukuqala?

SourceText: 🌱 Keep your child safe and healthy! 🌱
text: 🌱 Gcina unmntwana wakho ekhuselekile kwaye esempilweni! 🌱

SourceText: That's okay! You can easily access the Child Safety course any time you want via the main menu. Just type {MENU} to access it.
text: Kulungile! Ungafikelela ngokulula kwikhosi loKhuseleko loMntwana naliphi na ixesha xa ufuna ngemenyu ephambili. Vele uchwetheze {MENU} ukufikelela kuyo.

SourceText: Sorry. You are not eligible to participate in this programme. If you know a South African parent that might enjoy ParentText, you can send them this link to join:
text: Uxolo. Awufanelekanga ukuthatha inxaxheba kule nkqubo. Ukuba uyamazi umzali waseMzantsi Afrika onokonwabela i-ParentText, ungamthumelela eli khonkco ukuze ajoyine:

note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: You completed the ParentText demo. Type RESET and then {FACSTART} to re-start from the beginning.
text: Uyigqibile idemo ye ParentText. Cofa MISELA KWAKHONA kwa ngoko {FACSTART} ukuphinda uqalele ekuqaleni.

SourceText: It looks like ParentText isn't working for you. Can you tell us why?
text: Kubonakala ngathi i-ParentText ayikusebenzeli. Ungasixelela ukuba kutheni?

SourceText: ParentText should only take 10 minutes a day to complete. Would you like to try a new lesson now?
text: I-ParentText kufuneka ithathe nje imizuzu elishumi kuphela ngosuku ukuyigqiba. Ingaba ungathanda ukuzama isifundo esitsha ngoku?

SourceText: Oh no! Why is ParentText not helpful?

It may seem like spending one-on-one time with your child won't help you with their behaviour right away, but patience is key. This time together helps you understand each other better and build a strong bond. When children feel heard and supported like this, it often helps improve their behaviour over time.
text: Kungabonakala ingathi ukuchitha ixesha kunye nomntwana wakho akuyi kukunceda ngokuziphatha kwabo kwangoko, kodwa umonde ngundoqo. Eli xesha kunye linceda ukuba niqondane ngcono kwaye lakha ubudlelwane obomeleleyo. Xa abantwana beziva beviwa kwaye bexhaswa ngolu hlobo, kudla ngokunceda ukuphucula ukuziphatha kwabo ekuhambeni kwexesha.

SourceText: Would you like to try a new lesson now to learn more about one-on-one time?
text: Ingaba ungathanda ukuzama isifundo esitsha ngoku ukuze ufunde ngakumbi malunga nexesha elinye kunye?

SourceText: I might know some resources that can help.
Feeling sad, stressed, or having trouble with your child's behaviour? 😟 These places can help: 💡
text: Uziva ulusizi, uxinzelelekile, okanye unengxaki ngokuziphatha komntwana wakho? 😟 Ezi ndawo zinokunceda: 💡

SourceText: Take care of yourself! 😊 Your local clinic is here to help with any health problems. If you need extra support, here are some free helplines: ☎️
text: Zikhathalele! 😊 Iklinikhi yendawo yakho ilapha ukunceda naziphi na iingxaki zempilo. Ukuba ufuna inkxaso eyongezelelweyo, nantsi iminxeba yoncedo yasimahla: ☎️

SourceText: Seeing or going through violence can be scary and confusing. 😔 But there are people who can help you and your child! 💕
text: Ukubona okanye ukuba kubundlobongela kunokothusa kwaye kukubhide. 😔 Kodwa kukho abantu abanokukunceda nomntwana wakho! 💕

SourceText: A lot of our energy goes into helping the person struggling with substance abuse. While that’s important, you and your family need support too! 💖 Find help for everyone below: ⬇️
text: Amandla ethu amaninzi aya ekuncedeni umntu onengxaki yokuxhaphaza iziyobisi. Nangona oko kubalulekile, wena nosapho lwakho nani nifuna inkxaso! 💖 Fumana uncedo lomntu wonke ongezantsi: ⬇️

SourceText: Family life can be tough! 😣 Did you know that social workers at your local Department of Social Development can help with parenting skills, fatherhood, teenage pregnancy, and family or relationship counselling? If there isn’t a DSD office near you, NGOs in your area offer this support too. 🌍
text: Ubomi bentsapho bunokuba nzima! 😣 Ubusazi na ukuba oonontlalontle kwiSebe loPhuhliso lweNtlalo banokukunceda ngezakhono zobuzali, ubutata, ukukhulelwa kolutsha, kunye neengcebiso kusapho okanye ngobudlelwane? Ukuba akho ofisi yeDSD kufutshane nawe, iiNGOs kwingingqi yakho nazo zibonelela ngale nkxaso. 🌍

SourceText: Legal and SASSA issues can be stressful and confusing! 😵 There may be more support available than you realise at the organisations below: 👇
text: Eyomthetho kunye no-SASSA imiba inganoxinzelelo kwaye iyabhida! 😵 Kungakhona inkxaso eyongezelelweyo kunokuba usazi kulemibutho ingezantsi: 👇

SourceText: Understanding sexual and gender development can be confusing and hard to talk about. 🌈 We’re all unique! Here’s some support and guidance: 💡
text: Ukuqonda ukukhula ngokwezesondo kunye nesini kunokubhida kwaye kubenzima ukuthetha ngako. 🌈Sonke sahlukile! Nazi ezinye zenkxaso kunye nesikhokhelo: 💡

SourceText: School is where your child spends most of their time. 🏫 Making sure they are in school, happy, and supported is really important. If you're having trouble with any school issues, here’s some help: 📚
text: Esikolweni kulapho umntwana wakho achitha khona ixesha lakhe elininzi.🏫 Ukuqinisekisa ukuba usesikolweni, kwaye wonwabile, kwaye uyaxhaswa kubalulekile kakhulu. Ukuba usokoliswa nayiphi na imiba yesikolo, nalu uncedo: 📚

SourceText: I’m sorry that I cannot help with your challenge. If you want to access this information again, you can type {HELP} at any time.
text: Ndiyaxolisa ngokuba ndingakwazi ukukunceda kumceli-mngeni wakho. Ukuba ufuna ukufikelela kulwazi kwakhona, ungabhala {HELP} nangaliphi na ixesha.

SourceText: I hope this was helpful! You can access this information at any time by typing {HELP}.
text: Siyathemba lento ibeluncedo! Ungakwazi ukuzifumana ezinkcukacha nangeliphina ixesha ngokubhala {HELP}.

SourceText: If you are facing challenges that are making it more difficult to focus on parenting, I have some resources that can help.
text: Ukuba ujongene nemiceli-mngeni eyenza kube nzima ngakumbi ukugxila kubuzali, ndinezixhobo ezithile ezinokukunceda.

SourceText: Thank you for letting us know.
That’s okay. These skills are hard at first. I encourage you to complete ParentText. If you still want more support, here are some parenting resources available:
text: Oko kulungile. Ezi zakhono zinzima ekuqaleni. Ndiyakukhuthaza ukuba ugcwalise i-ParentText. Ukuba usafuna inkxaso eyongezelelekileyo, nazi ezinye izibonelelo zobuzali ezikhoyo:

SourceText: I hope this was helpful. See you tomorrow
Caring for a child with disabilities is challenging. Keep trying and remember to take care of yourself. Here are additional parenting resources for parents of children with special needs:
text: Ukukhathalela umntwana onokhubazeko kungumceli-mngeni. Qhubeka uzama kwaye ukhumbule ukuzikhathalela. Nazi izixhobo ezongezelelweyo zobuzali kwabazali babantwana abaneemfuno ezikhethekileyo:

SourceText: It’s great that you already know so much about parenting. More courses are released on ParentText all of the time. I will let you know when new ones are available. If you want to learn more now, you can join an in-person parenting programme near you:
text: Kuhle ukuba sele unolwazi oluninzi malunga nokuba ngumzali. Ezinye izifundo zikhutshwa kwi-ParentText ngalo lonke ixesha. Ndiza kukwazisa xa ezintsha zifumaneka. Ukuba ufuna ukufunda ngakumbi ngoku, ungangenela ngobuqu inkqubo yobuzali ekufutshane nawe:

SourceText: Caring for a child with disabilities is challenging. Keep trying and remember to take care of yourself.
text: Ukukhathalela umntwana onesiphene kungumceli-mngeni. Qhubeka uzama kwaye ukhumbule ukuzikhathalela.

SourceText: Here are additional parenting resources for parents of children with special needs:
text: Nazi izixhobo ezongezelelweyo zobuzali kubazali babantwana abaneemfuno ezikhethekileyo:

SourceText: I am sorry to hear that ParentText is not working on your phone. Here are a few steps you can try:
text: Ndiyaxolisa ukuva ukuba i-ParentText ayisebenzi kwifowuni yakho. Nanga amanyathelo ambalwa onokuthi uwazame:

SourceText: 1. Ensure you have the latest version of WhatsApp installed on your phone.
text: 1. Qinisekisa ukuba unenguqulelo yamva nje ye-WhatsApp efakwe kwifowuni yakho.

SourceText: 2. Check your internet connection to make sure it's stable.
text: 2. Jonga uqhagamshelwano lwe-internet yakho uqiniseke ukuba luzinzile.

SourceText: 3. Send a message on WhatsApp to {WhatsApp SWIFT line support} to get additional help. Be sure to share your user ID. Your user ID is @contact.id
text: 3. Thumela umyalezo ngo-WhatsApp ku {WhatsApp SWIFT line support} ukuze ufumane uncedo olongezelelweyo. Qinisekisa ukuba wabelana ngeID oyisebenzisayo. I-ID oyisebenzisayo ithi @contact.id
note: Strings like @fields.xxx and @results.yyy should not be translated.

SourceText: We're here to listen. Please tell how to make ParentText more helpful by sharing your feedback in a single message.
text: Silapha ukuze siphulaphule. Nceda usixelele indlela yokwenza i-ParentText ibe luncedo ngakumbi ngokwabelana ngengxelo yakho ngomyalezo omnye.

SourceText: Thank you for sharing your feedback.
Type 1 to resume the programme when you are ready!
Here is a video that shows how to use ParentText.
text: Nantsi ividiyo ebonisa ukuba isetyenziswa njani i-ParentText.

SourceText: It looks like you’re not interested in the Child Safety course right now. If you want to join the Child Safety course later, just press 1. 📚
